subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket over a light long-sleeved top and light trousers, stepping off the curb to cross the desert-edge town street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack, wears canvas shoes dusted with sand; the red jacket vivid against the pale sandy haze
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket over a light long-sleeved top, light trousers, canvas shoes, small backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Olive to light brown, smooth youthful skin
subjects.facial_features: Round face, dark short hair, small features

subjects.description: A couple of parked cars along the curbs of the desert-edge town street, dulled by a film of sandy dust
subjects.appearance_details: Older sedans in sun-faded pale colors, a coating of fine sand haze on their panels beside the low courtyard walls
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A residential street in a Middle-Eastern desert-edge town on a hazy midday, with light dust haze softening the air. Low sand-colored concrete and stucco houses with flat roofs and walled courtyards line a two-lane road of dry, sand-dusted asphalt. A few date palms and a couple of parked cars sit along the curbs; low walls edge the homes. A warm, sandy diffuse glow fills the hazy sky, muting the distance and casting soft, weak shadows over the pale road and its faded center markings.

lighting.conditions: Hazy desert-edge midday with light dust in the air
lighting.direction: High sun diffused by warm dust haze, softening its direction
lighting.shadows: Soft, weak, warm-toned shadows muted by the dust haze
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm, sandy diffuse glow with hazy low contrast; the child's red jacket cuts vividly through the pale sandy haze

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Sandy tans and warm beiges, pale dust-hazed sky, dry sand-dusted asphalt, dusty date palms, and a vivid red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Warm, still, hazy desert-town midday calm broken by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating walled courtyards and flat roofs, date palms, a couple of parked cars, drifting dust haze

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road and crossing child; the sandy dust haze softly veils the distance

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the hazy desert-edge town residential street at midday.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the sand-dusted asphalt, decelerating as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the sand-dusted asphalt, partially faded and dust-filmed, still legible in the hazy light
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the hazy desert-edge town street, sand-colored houses and date palms softened by dust haze along the road.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed through dust haze
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly on the sandy surface.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely in the hazy warmth.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down a hazy Middle-Eastern desert-edge town residential street at midday, sand-colored houses and date palms softened by dust haze past a couple of parked cars. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking on the sandy asphalt, slowing with a slight forward pitch. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary in the hazy heat while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Warm desert-town midday sounds of a dry wind and distant voices, the hum of the vehicle over sand-dusted asphalt, then firm tire and brake friction on the gritty surface as it decelerates, settling into a quiet idle in the hazy heat.
